## Description

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run command: `aigov scan ...`
2. With these flags / options: ...
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message or unexpected output.

paste output here

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.9]
- aigov version: [e.g. 0.1.0 — run `aigov --version`]
- Install method: [pip / uv / source]
- AWS scanner: [yes / no — did you install `aigov[aws]`?]
